description: Modify the 'payment-processor' and 'order-routing' deployments in the 'transaction-system' namespace to comply with the organization's Zero-Downtime Policy located at /home/ga/Desktop/zero_downtime_policy.md. Update the rollout strategy, termination grace period, and preStop hooks for both deployments, and create PodDisruptionBudgets named 'payment-processor-pdb' and 'order-routing-pdb' according to the policy specifications. Ensure all pods remain in a healthy Running state. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678!
